mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenants WHERE tenant_id > 0

SELECT t.tenant_id AS tenantId, t.tenant_key AS tenantKey, t.tenant_name AS tenantName, t.plan_type AS planType, t.active, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u WHERE u.tenant_id = t.tenant_id), 0) AS userCount, t.created_at AS createdAt FROM tenants t WHERE t.tenant_id > 0 ORDER BY t.tenant_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.tenant_id AS tenantId, t.tenant_key AS tenantKey, t.tenant_name AS tenantName, t.plan_type AS planType, t.active, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u WHERE u.tenant_id = t.tenant_id), 0) AS userCount, t.created_at AS createdAt FROM tenants t WHERE t.tenant_id > 0 ORDER BY t.tenant_id DESC
SELECT tenant_id AS tenantId, tenant_key AS tenantKey, tenant_name AS tenantName, plan_type AS planType, active, created_at AS createdAt FROM tenants WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenants (tenant_key, tenant_name, plan_type, active) VALUES (#{tenantKey}, #{tenantName}, #{planType}, #{active})
mapper.update: UPDATE tenants SET tenant_name = #{tenantName}, plan_type = #{planType}, active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (menu_id, parent_id, name, path, icon, sort_order, use_yn, menu_type, board_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, TRUE, #{menuType}, #{boardId}, #{tenantId}) ON CONFLICT (menu_id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO menu_roles (menu_id, role_key) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{roleKey}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO boards (board_id, name, description, use_yn, tenant_id) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{name}, #{description}, TRUE, #{tenantId}) ON CONFLICT (board_id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO role_actions (tenant_id, role_key, action_id) SELECT #{tenantId}, #{roleKey}, action_id FROM screen_actions ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO code_groups (group_key, group_name, use_yn, tenant_id) VALUES (#{groupKey}, #{groupName}, TRUE, #{tenantId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO codes (group_key, code, name, value, sort_order, use_yn, tenant_id) VALUES (#{groupKey}, #{code}, #{name}, #{value}, #{sortOrder}, TRUE, #{tenantId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, name, role_key, org_id, tenant_id, enabled) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{roleKey}, NULL, #{tenantId}, TRUE) ON CONFLICT (username) DO NOTHING
